subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1913-02-09
subcodes.first_line: Today some one asked a question regarding the existence of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز شخصی از وجود الوهیت سوال کرد که چه برهان بر وجود الوهیت دارید چه که ناس
subcodes.subjects: @creation of the world, @proofs for the existence of God, @law of cause and effect, @composition and decomposition, @elementary matter cannot be annihilated, @existence and nonexistence; preexistence
